reviews.comment:
Hoy llevé mi auto para revisarle los frenos. Me atendió Martin. Excelente atención. Me solucionó el problema y en forma rapida. Y me cobró solamente el líquido de frenos. Un lujo. Muchas gracias. No voy a dudar en volver cuando haga falta. Saludos.

(Translated by Google)
Today I took my car in to have the brakes checked. Martin took care of me. Excellent service. He fixed the problem quickly. And he only charged me for the brake fluid. A real bargain. Thank you so much. I won't hesitate to come back when I need to. Best regards.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNNZzdIbzRnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excente atencion. Donde uno encuentra todos los servicios para el automovil.
Merece tambien un elogio su cafeteria muy bien atendida y con buenos productos. La recomiendo.

Excellent service. A place where you can find all the services you need for your car.
Their cafeteria also deserves praise; it's very well run and has good products. I recommend it.
